title: Bosch H4 (472) Pure Light Halogen Headlight Bulbs, 12 V 55 W, Original Quality - Socket Type P43t - Pack of 2 Replacement Car Light Bulbs
seller_info_text: Sold by TopKnotch Product (VAT registered) and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Embrace simplicity: The Bosch Pure Light range offers a good price-performance ratio without compromising on quality, making it the preferred choice of many drivers
Reliable: The H4 Pure Light offers a broad spread and safer driving from the faintest dusk to the darkest nights
Easy installation: Respect precautions and use gloves, touching the bulb with your fingers may shorten its lifespan
Tip: Each bulb has a similar lifespan, we recommend replacing your headlights in pairs to prevent any light imbalances and to avoid another visit to the workshop in a short time
Compatibility matters: To enjoy a safe and smooth ride on the road check the bulb type (e.g. H4) on your current bulbs and adhere to all restrictions to ensure the correct fit
Scope of delivery: Each pack includes 2 H4, ECE approved halogen bulbs
description: From the manufacturer For those searching for a good price-performance ratio Leveraging a century of automotive lighting expertise, Bosch ensures excellent quality. With the Bosch Pure Light headlights, you will discover the world of original quality parts. When it comes to navigating the night, clarity and visibility are paramount. The Bosch Pure Light headlight bulb will reliably do this and more. Thanks to the long lifespan, the bulbs also rarely need replacing. Easy to install, they are the preferred choice for many drivers searching for replacement headlight bulbs. Good value: The Pure Light series delivers an excellent balance between cost and performance. Long-lasting: Long service life for fewer replacements. Excellent quality: Made with high-quality materials and components. Universal: The comprehensive Pure Light product line offers suitable vehicle lamps for almost every field of operation. Pure Light Longlife Daytime Plus 120 Gigalight Plus 150 Gigalight Plus 200 Gigalight Ultra White Category Original Quality Longevity Performance Performance Performance Customizing Benefit Reliability and simplicity Up to 3x longer lifetime Up to 120% more light Up to 150% more light Up to 200% more light White light LED look Temperature Up to 3300K Up to 3250K Up to 3500K Up to 3600K Up to 3900K Up to 4800K (dep. on bulb type) Luminous flow Up to 1450 lm Up to 1400 lm Up to 1500 lm Up to 1550 lm Up to 1600 lm Up to 1400 lm Lifetime Up to 550 hours Up to 1500 hours Up to 350 hours Up to 250 hours Up to 250 hours Up to 400 hours Never in the dark: For your safety and to be compliant with the law, Bosch recommends that you always have a box of emergency backup bulbs in your vehicle in the event of failure. Gloves are your ally: Handling bulbs with your fingers may reduce their lifespan. When replacing them, it is advisable to use gloves. This also helps avoid potential burns. Change your lamps in pairs: If one bulb goes out, it won’t take long for the other one to stop working. For your safety and to save money on repairs, Bosch recommends changing both bulbs simultaneously. Stay bright: Bulbs naturally deteriorate and diminish in intensity over time. Bosch recommends changing them every 2 years on average.
